project_type: TypeScript monorepo - AI-native multi-app ecosystem platform
build_system: pnpm + Turbo. turbo.json defines tasks: lint (no deps), typecheck (depends on ^build), test (depends on ^build), build (depends on ^build, outputs dist/**). New packages need tsconfig.json extending root, package.json with scripts: build (tsc), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), lint (eslint .)
test_framework: Vitest with vi.mock for mocking. Tests in src/__tests__/ directory. Import from vitest: describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, 2. pnpm typecheck, 3. pnpm build, 4. pnpm test, 5. pnpm lint, 6. pnpm audit --audit-level=high
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access. Node.js 22 with pnpm available. Strict TS: noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitOverride.
contribution_requirements: All code must pass typecheck, build, test, lint. No any types. Use Zod for validation. Follow existing package patterns. New packages go under packages/ and must be added to pnpm-workspace.yaml (already uses packages/* glob). Tests must be meaningful.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts. Types in src/types.ts. Tests in src/__tests__/. package.json uses workspace:* for internal deps. tsconfig.json extends ../../tsconfig.json with composite:true, outDir:./dist, rootDir:./src. ESM module type.
directory_structure: apps/ (13 Next.js apps), packages/ (41 shared packages), services/ (17 backend services), infra/ (helm, terraform, docker-compose). Key packages: @quant/ai (AI engine, assistant, tools), @quant/common (shared types, activity feed), @quant/search (cross-app search), @quant/agent-runtime (agent execution), @quant/realtime (websocket/events).
